description_long: This lighthouse features a robust cylindrical brick tower painted in a muted red color, topped with a white lantern room and a conical red roof. A black metal gallery balcony encircles the lantern room, providing a walkway with protective railings. The entrance is marked by a small wooden door at the base, accessed via a short set of stone steps. Small rectangular windows are spaced along the tower, allowing light into the interior. The structure sits on a slightly raised stone platform, giving it a solid foundation. The overall design is utilitarian yet classic, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A cylindrical red-brick lighthouse with a white lantern room, conical roof, gallery balcony, and stone steps at the entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance door, stone steps, and the full cylindrical tower with the lantern room and balcony above.
description_view_1: Side view revealing a small window on the tower and the stone platform extending to the left.
description_view_2: Rear view with no visible doors or windows, highlighting the smooth, uninterrupted surface of the tower.
description_view_3: Angled rear view showing a window near the base and the stone platform extending to the right.
